title: Buildxact Estimate
description: A Buildxact construction estimate — the priced document a builder issues to a client capturing scope, line items, markup, and tax. Mirrors the Estimate resource exposed by api.buildxact.com.

jobId.description: Identifier of the parent job, if any.

customerId.description: Identifier of the customer this estimate is for.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code applied to monetary fields.

total.description: Subtotal of all items before markup and tax.

markup.description: Markup amount applied on top of the subtotal.

totalIncMarkup.description: Subtotal plus markup, exclusive of tax.

taxIncMarkup.description: Tax amount calculated on the markup-inclusive total.

totalIncMarkupTax.description: Grand total including markup and tax.

taxContext.description: Tax inclusivity context for the estimate.
